definitions.name: EffectDefinition
definitions.raw:
EffectDefinition {
    id: EffectId

    source: EffectSource

    category:
        AUTO
        | ACTIVATE
        | PERMANENT
        | REPLACEMENT

    applicationMode:
        ONE_SHOT
        | CONTINUOUS
        | DELAYED

    activationZones: Zone[]

    timing?: TimingExpression

    conditions?: ConditionExpression

    usageLimit?: UsageLimit

    optionality:
        MANDATORY
        | OPTIONAL

    activationCost?: ActivationCost

    resolution: ResolutionNode

    duration?: Duration

    ruleModifier?: RuleModifier

    metadata?: {
        sourceCardNumber: string
        effectIndex: number
        printedText: string
        normalizedText?: string
        parserVersion?: string
    }
}

definitions.name: EffectSource
definitions.raw:
EffectSource {
    objectRef:
        THIS_CARD
        | CARD_OBJECT_ID
        | RULE_OBJECT
        | GENERATED_EFFECT

    objectId?: CardObjectId

    physicalCardId?: PhysicalCardId

    owner:
        PLAYER
        | OPPONENT

    controller:
        PLAYER
        | OPPONENT

    sourceZone: Zone

    effectIndex?: number
}

definitions.name: CardObjectIdentity
EffectCategory
definitions.raw:
EffectCategory =
    AUTO
    | ACTIVATE
    | PERMANENT
    | REPLACEMENT

definitions.name: RuleModifier
definitions.raw:
RuleModifier {
    scope:
        DECK_CONSTRUCTION
        | CARD_NAME
        | CARD_COLOR
        | CARD_TYPE
        | CARD_ATTRIBUTE
        | STARTING_LIFE
        | STARTING_HAND
        | STARTING_DON
        | DON_DECK_SIZE
        | MAIN_DECK_SIZE
        | CHARACTER_AREA_CAPACITY
        | STAGE_AREA_CAPACITY
        | DEFEAT_CONDITION
        | VICTORY_CONDITION
        | PLAY_PERMISSION
        | ATTACK_PERMISSION
        | GAME_SETUP
        | GENERAL_RULE

    validFrom:
        DECK_REGISTRATION
        | PRE_GAME
        | GAME_SETUP
        | GAME_START
        | ALWAYS

    modifier: ModifierExpression
}

definitions.name: EffectApplicationMode
definitions.raw:
EffectApplicationMode =
    ONE_SHOT
    | CONTINUOUS
    | DELAYED

definitions.name: KeywordEffect
definitions.raw:
KeywordEffect =
    RUSH
    | RUSH_CHARACTER
    | DOUBLE_ATTACK
    | BANISH
    | BLOCKER
    | TRIGGER
    | UNBLOCKABLE

definitions.name: EffectMarker
definitions.raw:
EffectMarker =
    ACTIVATE_MAIN
    | EVENT_MAIN
    | EVENT_COUNTER

    | ON_PLAY
    | WHEN_ATTACKING
    | ON_BLOCK
    | ON_KO
    | ON_OPPONENT_ATTACK
    | END_OF_YOUR_TURN
    | END_OF_OPPONENT_TURN

    | YOUR_TURN
    | OPPONENT_TURN

    | DON_ATTACHED_THRESHOLD
    | DON_MINUS

    | ONCE_PER_TURN
    | TRASH_INSTRUCTION

definitions.name: GameState
definitions.raw:
GameState {
    gameId: string

    players: {
        player: PlayerState
        opponent: PlayerState
    }

    startingPlayer: PlayerId
    turnPlayer: PlayerId
    nonTurnPlayer: PlayerId

    turnNumber: number

    playerTurnNumber: {
        player: number
        opponent: number
    }

    phase: GamePhase

    battle?: BattleState

    resolutionQueue: EffectInstance[]

    pendingAutoEffects: EffectInstance[]

    pendingRuleProcessing: RuleProcess[]

    continuousModifiers: ContinuousModifier[]

    replacementEffects: ReplacementEffectInstance[]

    delayedEffects: DelayedEffectInstance[]

    eventHistory: GameEvent[]

    currentResolution?: ResolutionContext
}

definitions.name: GamePhase
definitions.raw:
GamePhase =
    GAME_SETUP
    | REFRESH_PHASE
    | DRAW_PHASE
    | DON_PHASE
    | MAIN_PHASE
    | END_PHASE

definitions.name: BattleStep
definitions.raw:
BattleStep =
    ATTACK_STEP
    | BLOCK_STEP
    | COUNTER_STEP
    | DAMAGE_STEP
    | END_OF_BATTLE

definitions.name: PlayerState
definitions.raw:
PlayerState {
    playerId: PlayerId

    leader: LeaderState

    deck: OrderedCardZone
    hand: CardZone
    trash: CardZone
    life: OrderedCardZone

    donDeck: OrderedDonZone
    costArea: DonZone

    characterArea: CharacterState[]
    stageArea?: StageState

    limits: {
        maxCharacters: number
        maxStages: number
        mainDeckSize: number
        donDeckSize: number
    }

    turnState: PlayerTurnState

    usageTrackers: UsageTracker[]
}

definitions.name: DerivedPlayerState
definitions.raw:
DerivedPlayerState {
    currentLifeCount: number
    handCount: number
    deckCount: number
    trashCount: number

    donDeckCount: number
    activeDonCount: number
    restedDonCount: number
    attachedDonCount: number

    characterCount: number
    stageCount: number
}

definitions.name: LeaderState
definitions.raw:
LeaderState {
    objectId: CardObjectId
    cardNumber: string

    printedName: string
    effectiveNames: string[]

    printedColors: Color[]
    effectiveColors: Color[]

    printedTypes: string[]
    effectiveTypes: string[]

    printedAttributes: Attribute[]
    effectiveAttributes: Attribute[]

    printedLife: number
    startingLife: number
    currentLifeCount: number

    basePower: number
    currentPower: number

    state:
        ACTIVE
        | RESTED

    attachedDon: DonObjectId[]

    baseEffects: EffectDefinition[]
    gainedEffects: EffectInstance[]
    invalidatedEffects: EffectId[]

    temporaryModifiers: ModifierInstance[]

    attackCountThisTurn: number
    usageTrackers: UsageTracker[]
}

definitions.name: CardDefinition
definitions.raw:
CardDefinition {
    cardNumber: string
    cardCategory:
        LEADER
        | CHARACTER
        | EVENT
        | STAGE
        | DON

    printedName: string

    colors: Color[]
    types: string[]
    attributes: Attribute[]

    printedCost?: number
    printedPower?: number
    printedCounter?: number
    printedLife?: number

    blockNumber?: number

    baseEffects: EffectDefinition[]
}

definitions.name: CardState
definitions.raw:
CardState {
    physicalCardId: PhysicalCardId
    objectId: CardObjectId
    zoneChangeVersion: number

    definition: CardDefinition

    owner: PlayerId
    controller: PlayerId

    zone: Zone

    state?:
        ACTIVE
        | RESTED

    face:
        FACE_UP
        | FACE_DOWN

    effectiveProperties: {
        names: string[]
        colors: Color[]
        types: string[]
        attributes: Attribute[]

        cost?: number
        power?: number
        counter?: number
        life?: number
    }

    attachedDon: DonObjectId[]

    gainedEffects: EffectInstance[]
    invalidatedEffects: EffectId[]

    temporaryModifiers: ModifierInstance[]

    enteredCurrentZoneAt: GameEventId

    playedTurn?: number
    attackCountThisTurn: number

    usageTrackers: UsageTracker[]
}

definitions.name: Zone
definitions.raw:
Zone =
    LEADER_AREA
    | CHARACTER_AREA
    | STAGE_AREA
    | COST_AREA
    | ATTACHED_DON

    | HAND
    | DECK
    | TRASH
    | LIFE
    | DON_DECK

    | RESOLVING_TRIGGER
    | RESOLUTION_LIMBO
    | NONE

definitions.name: VirtualZone
definitions.raw:
VirtualZone =
    FIELD
    | OWN_FIELD
    | OPPONENT_FIELD
    | ALL_AREAS
    | OPEN_AREAS
    | SECRET_AREAS

definitions.name: ZoneVisibility
definitions.raw:
ZoneVisibility =
    OPEN
    | SECRET
    | CONDITIONALLY_OPEN

definitions.name: BattleState
definitions.raw:
BattleState {
    battleId: string

    attackingPlayer: PlayerId

    attacker: CardObjectId

    originalTarget: CardObjectId
    currentTarget: CardObjectId

    blocker?: CardObjectId

    step: BattleStep

    attackerPower: number
    targetPower: number

    baseDamage: number
    currentDamage: number

    attackProperties: {
        canAttackLeader: boolean
        canAttackActiveCharacters: boolean
        canAttackRestedCharacters: boolean
        unblockable: boolean
        banish: boolean
    }

    counterPowerAdded: number

    battleEvents: GameEventId[]
}

definitions.name: TimingExpression
definitions.raw:
TimingExpression =
    STANDARD_TIMING(StandardTiming)
    | CUSTOM_EVENT(EventPattern)
    | MANUAL_WINDOW(ManualTiming)
    | REPLACEMENT_WINDOW(ReplacementPattern)
    | AND(TimingExpression[])
    | OR(TimingExpression[])

definitions.name: StandardTiming
definitions.raw:
StandardTiming =
    ON_PLAY
    | WHEN_ATTACKING
    | ON_OPPONENT_ATTACK
    | ON_BLOCK
    | ON_KO

    | END_OF_YOUR_TURN
    | END_OF_OPPONENT_TURN

    | ACTIVATE_MAIN
    | EVENT_MAIN
    | EVENT_COUNTER

    | TRIGGER

definitions.name: ManualTiming
definitions.raw:
ManualTiming {
    phase:
        MAIN_PHASE
        | COUNTER_STEP
        | TRIGGER_RESOLUTION

    controller:
        PLAYER
        | OPPONENT

    battleRestriction:
        OUTSIDE_BATTLE
        | DURING_BATTLE
        | ANY
}

definitions.name: EventPattern
definitions.raw:
EventPattern {
    type: GameEventType

    subject?: Selector

    actor?:
        PLAYER
        | OPPONENT
        | ANY

    cause?: EventCause

    fromZone?: Zone
    toZone?: Zone

    conditions?: ConditionExpression
}

definitions.name: GameEventType
definitions.raw:
GameEventType =
    TURN_STARTED
    | PHASE_STARTED
    | PHASE_ENDED

    | CARD_PLAYED
    | CARD_ACTIVATED
    | EFFECT_ACTIVATED
    | EFFECT_RESOLVED

    | CARD_MOVED
    | CARD_ADDED_TO_HAND
    | CARD_ADDED_TO_LIFE
    | CARD_TRASHED
    | CARD_RETURNED_TO_DECK

    | CHARACTER_KOD
    | CHARACTER_REMOVED_FROM_FIELD

    | CARD_BECAME_ACTIVE
    | CARD_BECAME_RESTED

    | ATTACK_DECLARED
    | ATTACK_TARGET_SELECTED
    | BLOCKER_ACTIVATED
    | DAMAGE_DEALT
    | DAMAGE_TAKEN
    | BATTLE_ENDED

    | DON_GIVEN
    | DON_DETACHED
    | DON_RESTED
    | DON_SET_ACTIVE
    | DON_RETURNED_TO_DON_DECK

    | LIFE_REVEALED
    | TRIGGER_ACTIVATED

definitions.name: EventCause
definitions.raw:
EventCause =
    RULE
    | BATTLE
    | DAMAGE
    | CARD_PLAY_COST
    | CARD_ACTIVATION
    | ACTIVATION_COST
    | EFFECT
    | REPLACEMENT_EFFECT
    | REFRESH_PHASE
    | DEFEAT_PROCESSING

definitions.name: ConditionExpression
definitions.raw:
ConditionExpression =
    TRUE
    | FALSE

    | PREDICATE(ConditionPredicate)

    | AND(ConditionExpression[])
    | OR(ConditionExpression[])
    | NOT(ConditionExpression)

    | ALL(Selector, ConditionExpression)
    | ANY(Selector, ConditionExpression)

definitions.name: ConditionPredicate
definitions.raw:
ConditionPredicate {
    left: ValueExpression

    operator:
        EQUAL
        | NOT_EQUAL
        | GREATER_THAN
        | GREATER_OR_EQUAL
        | LESS_THAN
        | LESS_OR_EQUAL
        | CONTAINS
        | EXISTS
        | NOT_EXISTS
        | MATCHES

    right?: ValueExpression
}

definitions.name: ConditionType
definitions.raw:
ConditionType =
    TURN_IS
    | PHASE_IS
    | BATTLE_STEP_IS

    | SOURCE_IS_ACTIVE
    | SOURCE_IS_RESTED
    | SOURCE_IS_ATTACKING
    | SOURCE_WAS_PLAYED_THIS_TURN

    | DON_ATTACHED_COUNT
    | DON_ON_FIELD_COUNT
    | ACTIVE_DON_COUNT
    | RESTED_DON_COUNT

    | LIFE_COUNT
    | HAND_COUNT
    | DECK_COUNT
    | TRASH_COUNT
    | CHARACTER_COUNT

    | CARD_EXISTS
    | CARD_COUNT
    | ALL_CARDS_MATCH
    | NO_CARD_MATCHES

    | LEADER_MATCHES
    | SOURCE_MATCHES

    | EVENT_OCCURRED
    | EVENT_OCCURRED_THIS_TURN
    | EVENT_OCCURRED_THIS_BATTLE

    | EFFECT_HAS_RESOLVED
    | ACTION_SUCCEEDED

    | PLAYER_TURN_NUMBER
    | GAME_TURN_NUMBER

definitions.name: ValueExpression
definitions.raw:
ValueExpression =
    NUMBER(number)
    | BOOLEAN(boolean)
    | STRING(string)

    | PROPERTY(ObjectReference, PropertyName)

    | COUNT(Selector)

    | PREVIOUS_RESULT(ResultReference)

    | ADD(ValueExpression[])
    | SUBTRACT(ValueExpression, ValueExpression)
    | MULTIPLY(ValueExpression[])
    | DIVIDE(ValueExpression, ValueExpression)

    | MIN(ValueExpression[])
    | MAX(ValueExpression[])

    | CLAMP(ValueExpression, min, max)

definitions.name: UsageLimit
definitions.raw:
UsageLimit {
    maximumUses: number

    period:
        PER_TURN
        | PER_BATTLE
        | PER_GAME
        | WHILE_IN_CURRENT_ZONE
        | CUSTOM

    trackerScope:
        EFFECT_INSTANCE
        | CARD_OBJECT
        | PHYSICAL_CARD
        | PLAYER
        | CARD_NAME

    resetsAt?: TimingExpression

    consumeWhen:
        ACTIVATED
        | COST_PAYMENT_STARTED
        | COST_PAID
        | RESOLVED
}

definitions.name: ActivationCost
definitions.raw:
ActivationCost {
    preconditions?: ConditionExpression

    payments: CostAction[]

    optionalPayment:
        REQUIRED_TO_ACTIVATE
        | PLAYER_MAY_DECLINE

    executionPolicy:
        VERIFY_ALL_THEN_PAY_IN_ORDER
}

definitions.name: CostAction
definitions.raw:
CostAction =
    REST_DON_COST {

definitions.name: REST_DON_COST
DON_MINUS_COST
REST_CARD_COST
TRASH_CARD_COST
ResolutionNode
definitions.raw:
ResolutionNode =
    ACTION(Action)

    | SEQUENCE(ResolutionNode[])

    | OPTIONAL {

definitions.name: ActionResult
definitions.raw:
ActionResult {
    actionId: ActionId

    attempted: boolean
    succeeded: boolean

    selectedObjects: ObjectId[]
    affectedObjects: ObjectId[]

    requestedAmount?: number
    completedAmount?: number

    previousZones?: Zone[]
    resultingZones?: Zone[]

    prevented: boolean
    replaced: boolean

    replacementEffectId?: EffectId

    generatedEvents: GameEventId[]
}

definitions.name: Action
definitions.raw:
Action =
    CardAction
    | LifeAction
    | StateAction
    | DonAction
    | StatAction
    | InformationAction
    | EffectAction
    | PermissionAction
    | BattleAction
    | PlayerAction
    | RuleAction

definitions.name: CardAction
definitions.raw:
CardAction =
    DRAW_CARD
    | MOVE_CARD
    | PLAY_CARD
    | ACTIVATE_EVENT
    | TRASH_CARD
    | KO_CARD
    | RETURN_CARD
    | ADD_CARD_TO_HAND
    | PLACE_CARD_IN_DECK
    | REVEAL_CARD
    | LOOK_AT_CARDS
    | SELECT_CARD
    | REORDER_CARDS
    | SHUFFLE_ZONE

definitions.name: MOVE_CARD
definitions.raw:
MOVE_CARD {
    selector: Selector

    from: Zone
    to: Zone

    placement?: {
        TOP
        | BOTTOM
        | TOP_OR_BOTTOM
        | ANY_POSITION
        | RANDOM
        | NOT_APPLICABLE
    }

    order?: {
        PRESERVE_ORDER
        | OWNER_CHOOSES
        | EFFECT_PLAYER_CHOOSES
        | RANDOM
    }

    face?: {
        FACE_UP
        | FACE_DOWN
        | PRESERVE
    }

    cause:
        DRAW
        | PLAY
        | KO
        | TRASH
        | RETURN
        | DAMAGE
        | COST
        | EFFECT
        | RULE
}

definitions.name: DRAW_CARD
PLAY_CARD
definitions.raw:
PLAY_CARD {
    selector: Selector

    destination:
        CHARACTER_AREA
        | STAGE_AREA

    controller: PlayerReference

    state:
        ACTIVE
        | RESTED

    triggerOnPlay:
        ENABLED
        | DISABLED

    costPolicy:
        PAY_NORMAL_COST
        | PLAY_WITHOUT_PAYING_COST
        | PAY_ALTERNATIVE_COST
}

definitions.name: KO_CARD
definitions.raw:
KO_CARD {
    selector: Selector

    cause:
        EFFECT
        | BATTLE
        | COST
}

definitions.name: TRASH_CARD
definitions.raw:
TRASH_CARD {
    selector: Selector

    cause:
        EFFECT
        | COST
        | RULE

    treatedAsKO: false
}

definitions.name: ADD_CARD_TO_HAND
definitions.raw:
ADD_CARD_TO_HAND {
    selector: Selector

    from:
        DECK
        | TRASH
        | LIFE
        | CHARACTER_AREA
        | STAGE_AREA

    triggerPolicy:
        DO_NOT_CHECK_TRIGGER
}

definitions.name: RETURN_CARD
definitions.raw:
RETURN_CARD {
    selector: Selector

    destination:
        HAND
        | DECK

    deckPlacement?:
        TOP
        | BOTTOM
        | TOP_OR_BOTTOM

    owner:
        CARD_OWNER
}

definitions.name: SEARCH
LOOK_AT_CARDS
definitions.raw:
LOOK_AT_CARDS {
    player: PlayerReference

    zone:
        DECK
        LIFE
        HAND

    position:
        TOP
        BOTTOM
        ALL

    count: ValueExpression

    visibility:
        EFFECT_PLAYER_ONLY
        OWNER_ONLY
        BOTH_PLAYERS
}

definitions.name: SELECT_CARD
REVEAL_CARD
definitions.raw:
REVEAL_CARD {
    selector: Selector
    viewers:
        BOTH_PLAYERS
        PLAYER
        OPPONENT
}

definitions.name: REORDER_CARDS
definitions.raw:
REORDER_CARDS {
    cards: ResultReference

    destination:
        TOP_OF_DECK
        BOTTOM_OF_DECK
        LIFE

    orderChooser:
        PLAYER
        OPPONENT
        OWNER
        RANDOM
}

definitions.name: LifeAction
definitions.raw:
LifeAction =
    ADD_CARD_TO_LIFE
    | TAKE_LIFE_TO_HAND
    | TRASH_LIFE
    | TAKE_DAMAGE
    | REVEAL_LIFE
    | LOOK_AT_LIFE
    | REORDER_LIFE
    | TURN_LIFE_FACE_UP
    | TURN_LIFE_FACE_DOWN

definitions.name: ADD_CARD_TO_LIFE
definitions.raw:
ADD_CARD_TO_LIFE {
    selector: Selector

    position:
        TOP
        BOTTOM

    face:
        FACE_UP
        FACE_DOWN
}

definitions.name: TAKE_LIFE_TO_HAND
definitions.raw:
TAKE_LIFE_TO_HAND {
    player: PlayerReference

    position:
        TOP
        BOTTOM

    count: ValueExpression

    triggerPolicy:
        DO_NOT_CHECK_TRIGGER
}

definitions.name: TAKE_DAMAGE
definitions.raw:
TAKE_DAMAGE {
    targetPlayer: PlayerReference
    amount: ValueExpression

    lifeProcessing:
        CHECK_TRIGGER
        | BANISH
        | CUSTOM
}

definitions.name: TRASH_LIFE
definitions.raw:
TRASH_LIFE {
    player: PlayerReference

    position:
        TOP
        BOTTOM

    count: ValueExpression

    activateTrigger: false
}

definitions.name: StateAction
definitions.raw:
StateAction =
    REST_CARD
    | SET_CARD_ACTIVE
    | TURN_CARD_FACE_UP
    | TURN_CARD_FACE_DOWN

definitions.name: REST_CARD
SET_CARD_ACTIVE
DonAction
definitions.raw:
DonAction =
    ADD_DON_FROM_DON_DECK
    | GIVE_DON
    | DETACH_DON
    | REST_DON
    | SET_DON_ACTIVE
    | RETURN_DON_TO_DON_DECK
    | MOVE_DON_TO_COST_AREA

definitions.name: DonState
definitions.raw:
DonState =
    IN_DON_DECK
    | ACTIVE
    | RESTED
    | ATTACHED

definitions.name: ADD_DON_FROM_DON_DECK
definitions.raw:
ADD_DON_FROM_DON_DECK {
    player: PlayerReference

    count: ValueExpression

    destination: COST_AREA

    state:
        ACTIVE
        | RESTED
}

definitions.name: GIVE_DON
DETACH_DON
definitions.raw:
DETACH_DON {
    sourceCard: Selector

    count: ValueExpression

    destination: COST_AREA

    state:
        RESTED
        | ACTIVE
}

definitions.name: RETURN_DON_TO_DON_DECK
StatAction
definitions.raw:
StatAction =
    MODIFY_POWER
    | MODIFY_COST
    | MODIFY_COUNTER
    | MODIFY_LIFE_VALUE
    | MODIFY_DAMAGE

definitions.name: ModifyStatAction
definitions.raw:
ModifyStatAction {
    selector: Selector

    stat:
        POWER
        | COST
        | COUNTER
        | LIFE_VALUE
        | DAMAGE

    propertyLayer:
        CURRENT_VALUE
        | BASE_VALUE
        | PRINTED_VALUE

    operation:
        ADD
        | SUBTRACT
        | SET
        | COPY
        | SET_TO_ZERO

    value: ValueExpression

    duration: Duration
}

definitions.name: InformationAction
definitions.raw:
InformationAction =
    MODIFY_NAME
    | MODIFY_COLOR
    | MODIFY_TYPE
    | MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE
    | MODIFY_BASE_EFFECT_STATUS

definitions.name: MODIFY_NAME
definitions.raw:
MODIFY_NAME {
    selector: Selector

    operation:
        ADD_NAME
        | REPLACE_NAMES
        | TREAT_AS_ADDITIONAL_NAME

    names: string[]

    duration: Duration
}

definitions.name: MODIFY_TYPE
definitions.raw:
MODIFY_TYPE {
    selector: Selector

    operation:
        ADD_TYPE
        | REMOVE_TYPE
        | REPLACE_TYPES

    types: string[]

    duration: Duration
}

definitions.name: EffectAction
definitions.raw:
EffectAction =
    GRANT_KEYWORD
    | REMOVE_KEYWORD
    | ADD_EFFECT
    | REMOVE_GAINED_EFFECT
    | INVALIDATE_EFFECTS
    | VALIDATE_EFFECTS
    | COPY_EFFECT
    | CREATE_DELAYED_EFFECT
    | CREATE_REPLACEMENT_EFFECT

definitions.name: GRANT_KEYWORD
REMOVE_KEYWORD
ADD_EFFECT
INVALIDATE_EFFECTS
definitions.raw:
INVALIDATE_EFFECTS {
    selector: Selector

    effectFilter:
        ALL_EFFECTS
        | AUTO_EFFECTS
        | ACTIVATE_EFFECTS
        | PERMANENT_EFFECTS
        | KEYWORD_EFFECTS
        | MATCHING_EFFECT

    duration: Duration
}

definitions.name: PermissionAction
definitions.raw:
PermissionAction =
    PREVENT_ACTION
    | ALLOW_ACTION
    | PREVENT_SELECTION
    | PREVENT_ZONE_CHANGE
    | MODIFY_VALID_TARGETS
    | MODIFY_PLAY_PERMISSION

definitions.name: PreventableAction
definitions.raw:
PreventableAction =
    DECLARE_ATTACK
    | ATTACK_LEADER
    | ATTACK_CHARACTER
    | ATTACK_ACTIVE_CHARACTER

    | ACTIVATE_BLOCKER
    | ACTIVATE_EFFECT

    | PLAY_CARD
    | ACTIVATE_EVENT

    | REST_CARD
    | SET_CARD_ACTIVE

    | KO_CARD
    | TRASH_CARD
    | RETURN_TO_HAND
    | RETURN_TO_DECK
    | REMOVE_FROM_FIELD

    | SELECT_AS_EFFECT_TARGET
    | DEAL_DAMAGE

definitions.name: PREVENT_ACTION
definitions.raw:
PREVENT_ACTION {
    selector: Selector
    action: PreventableAction

    causeFilter?:
        EFFECT
        | BATTLE
        | RULE
        | OPPONENT_EFFECT
        | OWN_EFFECT
        | ANY

    duration: Duration
}

definitions.name: ALLOW_ACTION
PREVENT_ACTION
BattleAction
definitions.raw:
BattleAction =
    DECLARE_ATTACK
    | CHANGE_ATTACK_TARGET
    | ACTIVATE_BLOCKER
    | CANCEL_ATTACK
    | END_BATTLE
    | DEAL_DAMAGE
    | SET_DAMAGE
    | MODIFY_DAMAGE
    | SKIP_BATTLE_STEP

definitions.name: DECLARE_ATTACK
CHANGE_ATTACK_TARGET
DEAL_DAMAGE
CANCEL_ATTACK
PlayerAction
definitions.raw:
PlayerAction =
    PLAYER_WINS
    | PLAYER_LOSES
    | OPPONENT_CHOOSES
    | PLAYER_CHOOSES

definitions.name: RuleAction
definitions.raw:
RuleAction =
    MODIFY_DEFEAT_CONDITION
    | MODIFY_VICTORY_CONDITION
    | MODIFY_DECK_CONSTRUCTION
    | MODIFY_STARTING_SETUP
    | MODIFY_AREA_CAPACITY
    | MODIFY_RULE_PERMISSION

definitions.name: Duration
definitions.raw:
Duration =
    INSTANT

    | THIS_BATTLE
    | THIS_TURN

    | UNTIL_END_OF_CURRENT_TURN

    | UNTIL_START_OF_NEXT_TURN(PlayerReference)
    | UNTIL_END_OF_NEXT_TURN(PlayerReference)

    | UNTIL_NEXT_REFRESH_PHASE(PlayerReference)
    | UNTIL_END_OF_NEXT_END_PHASE(PlayerReference)

    | WHILE_SOURCE_VALID
    | WHILE_SOURCE_IN_ZONE(Zone)
    | WHILE_SOURCE_STATE(CardStateValue)
    | WHILE_CONDITION(ConditionExpression)

    | UNTIL_EVENT(EventPattern)

    | PERMANENT

definitions.name: Selector
definitions.raw:
Selector {
    subject:
        CARD
        | DON
        | PLAYER
        | EFFECT
        | EVENT
        | ACTION_RESULT

    owner?:
        PLAYER
        | OPPONENT
        | ANY

    controller?:
        PLAYER
        | OPPONENT
        | ANY

    zones?: Zone[]

    cardCategories?: CardCategory[]

    names?: NameFilter[]

    cardNumbers?: string[]

    colors?: ColorFilter

    types?: TypeFilter

    attributes?: AttributeFilter

    cost?: NumericPropertyFilter
    power?: NumericPropertyFilter
    counter?: NumericPropertyFilter
    life?: NumericPropertyFilter

    states?: CardStateValue[]

    face?: FaceState[]

    keywords?: KeywordFilter

    effects?: EffectFilter

    baseEffectStatus?:
        ANY
        | HAS_BASE_EFFECT
        | NO_BASE_EFFECT

    relations?: RelationFilter[]

    history?: HistoryFilter[]

    quantity: Quantity

    chooser:
        EFFECT_OWNER
        | OPPONENT
        | CARD_OWNER
        | CARD_CONTROLLER
        | RANDOM

    distinctBy?:
        NONE
        | CARD_OBJECT
        | CARD_NUMBER
        | CARD_NAME

    ordering?: OrderingRule
}

definitions.name: CardCategory
definitions.raw:
CardCategory =
    LEADER
    | CHARACTER
    | EVENT
    | STAGE
    | DON

definitions.name: NameFilter
definitions.raw:
NameFilter =
    NAME_EXACT(string)
    | NAME_CONTAINS(string)
    | NAME_STARTS_WITH(string)
    | NAME_NOT(string)
    | NAME_EQUALS_REFERENCE(ObjectReference)

definitions.name: ColorFilter
definitions.raw:
ColorFilter =
    HAS_COLOR(Color)
    | HAS_ANY_COLOR(Color[])
    | HAS_ALL_COLORS(Color[])
    | ONLY_COLORS(Color[])
    | DOES_NOT_HAVE_COLOR(Color)

definitions.name: Color
definitions.raw:
Color =
    RED
    | GREEN
    | BLUE
    | PURPLE
    | BLACK
    | YELLOW

definitions.name: TypeFilter
definitions.raw:
TypeFilter =
    HAS_TYPE(string)
    | TYPE_INCLUDES_TEXT(string)
    | HAS_ANY_TYPE(string[])
    | HAS_ALL_TYPES(string[])
    | DOES_NOT_HAVE_TYPE(string)

definitions.name: Attribute
definitions.raw:
Attribute =
    SLASH
    | STRIKE
    | RANGED
    | SPECIAL
    | WISDOM

definitions.name: AttributeFilter
definitions.raw:
AttributeFilter =
    HAS_ATTRIBUTE(Attribute)
    | HAS_ANY_ATTRIBUTE(Attribute[])
    | HAS_ALL_ATTRIBUTES(Attribute[])
    | DOES_NOT_HAVE_ATTRIBUTE(Attribute)

definitions.name: NumericPropertyFilter
definitions.raw:
NumericPropertyFilter {
    propertyLayer:
        PRINTED
        | BASE
        | CURRENT

    comparison:
        EQUAL
        | NOT_EQUAL
        | AT_LEAST
        | AT_MOST
        | GREATER_THAN
        | LESS_THAN
        | BETWEEN

    value?: ValueExpression

    minimum?: ValueExpression
    maximum?: ValueExpression
}

definitions.name: CardStateValue
definitions.raw:
CardStateValue =
    ACTIVE
    | RESTED
    | ATTACKING
    | BLOCKING
    | PLAYED_THIS_TURN

definitions.name: EffectFilter
definitions.raw:
EffectFilter =
    HAS_KEYWORD(KeywordEffect)
    | DOES_NOT_HAVE_KEYWORD(KeywordEffect)

    | HAS_TIMING(StandardTiming)
    | DOES_NOT_HAVE_TIMING(StandardTiming)

    | HAS_EFFECT_CATEGORY(EffectCategory)

    | HAS_BASE_EFFECT
    | HAS_NO_BASE_EFFECT

    | EFFECT_TEXT_MATCHES(string)

definitions.name: RelationFilter
definitions.raw:
RelationFilter =
    THIS_CARD
    | OTHER_THAN_THIS_CARD

    | THIS_LEADER
    | THIS_CHARACTER
    | THIS_STAGE

    | ATTACKING_CARD
    | ORIGINAL_ATTACK_TARGET
    | CURRENT_ATTACK_TARGET
    | BLOCKING_CARD

    | EFFECT_SOURCE
    | EFFECT_OWNER_LEADER

    | SELECTED_BY(ResultReference)
    | PLAYED_BY(ResultReference)
    | KOD_BY(ResultReference)
    | TRASHED_BY(ResultReference)
    | RETURNED_BY(ResultReference)

    | CARD_THAT_TRIGGERED_THIS_EFFECT

    | SAME_NAME_AS(ObjectReference)
    | DIFFERENT_NAME_FROM(ObjectReference)

    | ATTACHED_TO(ObjectReference)
    | HAS_ATTACHED_DON

    | CONTROLLED_BY_SAME_PLAYER_AS(ObjectReference)
    | OWNED_BY_SAME_PLAYER_AS(ObjectReference)

definitions.name: HistoryFilter
definitions.raw:
HistoryFilter =
    PLAYED_THIS_TURN
    | PLAYED_BY_EFFECT
    | ATTACKED_THIS_TURN
    | BECAME_RESTED_THIS_TURN
    | KOD_THIS_TURN
    | RETURNED_TO_HAND_THIS_TURN
    | SELECTED_PREVIOUSLY

definitions.name: Quantity
definitions.raw:
Quantity =
    EXACTLY(ValueExpression)
    | UP_TO(ValueExpression)
    | AT_LEAST(ValueExpression)
    | ALL
    | ANY_NUMBER

definitions.name: OrderingRule
definitions.raw:
OrderingRule =
    FIELD_ORDER
    | DECK_ORDER
    | PLAYER_CHOOSES_ORDER
    | OWNER_CHOOSES_ORDER
    | OPPONENT_CHOOSES_ORDER
    | RANDOM_ORDER

definitions.name: CompositeSelector
definitions.raw:
CompositeSelector =
    SELECTOR(Selector)

    | AND(CompositeSelector[])
    | OR(CompositeSelector[])
    | NOT(CompositeSelector)

    | UNION(CompositeSelector[])
    | INTERSECTION(CompositeSelector[])
    | EXCLUDE(

definitions.name: ModifierExpression
definitions.raw:
ModifierExpression =
    STAT_MODIFIER
    | PROPERTY_MODIFIER
    | EFFECT_MODIFIER
    | PERMISSION_MODIFIER
    | RULE_MODIFIER

definitions.name: ModifierInstance
definitions.raw:
ModifierInstance {
    id: ModifierId

    sourceEffectId: EffectId
    sourceObjectId?: CardObjectId

    target: Selector

    modifier: ModifierExpression

    duration: Duration

    createdAt: GameEventId

    layer:
        RULE
        | PRINTED_INFORMATION
        | BASE_INFORMATION
        | CURRENT_INFORMATION
        | POWER
        | COST
        | EFFECT
        | PERMISSION
        | REPLACEMENT

    priority?: number
}

definitions.name: GameEvent
definitions.raw:
GameEvent {
    id: GameEventId

    type: GameEventType

    actor?: PlayerId

    sourceObject?: ObjectId
    subjectObjects: ObjectId[]

    sourceEffect?: EffectId

    cause: EventCause

    fromZone?: Zone
    toZone?: Zone

    amount?: number

    parentEvent?: GameEventId

    replacedBy?: EffectId
    preventedBy?: EffectId

    timestamp: ResolutionTimestamp
}

definitions.name: EffectInstance
definitions.raw:
EffectInstance {
    instanceId: EffectInstanceId

    definition: EffectDefinition

    sourceSnapshot: EffectSourceSnapshot

    controller: PlayerId

    activationEvent?: GameEventId

    status:
        PENDING
        ACTIVATING
        PAYING_COST
        RESOLVING
        RESOLVED
        CANCELLED
        INVALID

    selectedObjects: Map<SelectionId, ObjectId[]>

    actionResults: Map<ActionId, ActionResult>

    createdModifiers: ModifierId[]

    createdDelayedEffects: EffectInstanceId[]
}
